node_id.description: Stable URI for the peer node.

node_url.description: Base URL of the peer's HTTP API.

items.description: Visibility scope for a fact. `local` and `team` scopes are never federated (except with `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`). See spec §2.2.
items.title: FactScope

allowed_scopes.description: Scopes this peer is allowed to pull.

400.description: Invalid declaration or signature verification failed.

409.description: A peer with this node_id is already registered.
